name: Mom's Coconut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the eggs, self-rising flour, sugar, melted butter, and vanilla.
2. Gradually add milk to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into two pie pans lined with parchment paper or foil.
4. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Let cool before serving. This recipe makes its own crust.
